description: Style-guide snippets from commercial-OK sources (CC-BY, OGL, CC0), used by `tools/check_close_paraphrase.py` to warn when a ContentRX standard's rule text is suspiciously close to one of these without naming the source. Trimmed 2026-05-06 per ADR 2026-05-06-corpus-license-trim.
note: This corpus is intentionally small at seed time. Grow it as Robert audits new standards or adopts new sources. Each entry is a short transcription, fair-use quantity; attribution lives in the `source` field and (where available) the `url`.

snippets.text: Use OK and Cancel as confirmation-dialog button labels.
Write in plain English. Use short words. Avoid jargon and acronyms.
Write in plain language so anyone can understand. This is not dumbing down; it is writing for everyone.
